mapper.sql: a.id, a.customer_id as customerId, c.name as customerName, c.phone as customerPhone, a.employee_id as employeeId, e.name as employeeName, a.service_item_id as serviceItemId, si.name as serviceItemName, si.price as serviceItemPrice, a.appointment_time as appointmentTime, a.status, a.remark, a.create_time as createTime, a.update_time as updateTime
mapper.select:
select
from appointment a left join customer c on a.customer_id = c.id left join employee e on a.employee_id = e.id left join service_item si on a.service_item_id = si.id where a.id = #{id} and a.deleted = 0
